title: Non-record WIP: Systematic Eval-Time Prediction Mixing | Requesting compute credits for full 8xH100 evaluation.
author: sargonxg

parameters.description: Longest exact substring match in scored tokens used to predict continuation

data.description: O(n) attention replacement with 50% parameter savings per block
Custom 1536 tokenizer to reduce token count by 30%

novel_contributions: Systematic ablation study of eval-time prediction mixing across four complementary predictors
Demonstration that an LZ77 match model provides the largest single eval-time improvement
Comparison of match model, n-gram cache, FST grammar, and hybrid combinations
Exploration of S4D, Product Key Memory, and a custom 1536 tokenizer for future scaling
Projected 8xH100 evaluation with estimated BPB improvement from combining neural base with match model and cache
